# Test DAT fixtures

Place No-Intro `.dat` files here for testing.

Included:
- `sample.dat` — 3-game test DAT with known hash values (checked into repo)

For real testing: download DAT files from [DAT-o-MATIC](https://datomatic.no-intro.org/) and place them here.
These real DATs are NOT checked into git (too large / licensed).
